Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: An inbound hotel management consultation inquiry from a potential hotel partner

hotelName.description: The name of the hotel or building

location.description: The region or location of the hotel

roomsCount.description: The number of rooms in the hotel

clientName.description: The name of the client or representative

clientPosition.description: The position or title of the representative

monthlyRevenue.description: The current approximate monthly revenue of the hotel

worries.description: Selected key problems or worries of the hotel

status.description: The operational back-office processing status of this inquiry

adminMemo.description: Detailed admin-only consultation notes and logs

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the inquiry was submitted

/inquiries/{inquiryId}.description: Inbound hotel operator leads and inquiries
